findings.description: Several property names from the attribute table (first column) are missing from s2 hints: `domain`, `id`, `cssClass`, `multiple`, `size`, `dataFrom`, `comment`, `initialValueDesc`.
findings.source_evidence: Source attribute table lists all these as named attributes: domain, id, cssClass, multiple, size, dataFrom, comment, initialValueDesc — all are first-column property names that should appear in hints per V4 rules.
